name: Layer2 Financial
description: Payments-as-a-service API providing businesses collections, payouts, and FX on a single platform.

when_to_use: Collections, payouts, and FX on a single payment-as-a-service API
Cross-border B2B payment flows with embedded FX conversion
Embedding multi-currency payment rails into fintech or marketplace products
Treasury and multi-currency payment management for global business operations

pros: Collections, payouts, and FX in one API
review.verdict: Worth evaluating for platforms wanting collections, payouts, and FX bundled under a single modern API.
review.best_for: Marketplaces and platforms needing turnkey multi-rail payment ops
review.not_for: Teams needing only single-country card acquiring
